# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

imports:
- path: instance_template.jinja

resources:
- name: quickstart-instance
  type: instance_template.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: e2-medium
    network: global/networks/default
    subnetwork: regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default
    imageProject: debian-cloud
    imageFamily: debian-12
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

---
{% set name = env["name"] %}
{% set zone = properties["zone"] %}
{% set machineType = properties["machineType"] %}
{% set network = properties["network"] %}
{% set subnetwork = properties["subnetwork"] %}
{% set imageProject = properties["imageProject"] %}
{% set imageFamily = properties["imageFamily"] %}
{% set serviceAccounts = properties.get("serviceAccounts", [{"email": "default", "scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"]}]) %}

resources:
- name: {{ name }}
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: {{ zone }}
    machineType: zones/{{ zone }}/machineTypes/{{ machineType }}
    disks:
    - deviceName: {{ name }}
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/{{ imageProject }}/global/images/family/{{ imageFamily }}
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: {{ network }}
      subnetwork: {{ subnetwork }}
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
{% for sa in serviceAccounts %}
    - email: {{ sa["email"] }}
      scopes:
{% for scope in sa["scopes"] %}
      - {{ scope }}
{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
    tags:
      items:
      - http-server
      - https-server
